const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,300p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73279493 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73279493 -maxdepth 6 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73279493 --event evt-petition-disposition; find data/cases/scotus/73279493 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"wc -c data/cases/scotus/73279493/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml data/cases/scotus/73279493/record/context.json data/cases/scotus/73279493/record/snapshots/2026-07-16.json data/cases/scotus/73279493/record/documents/documents.json data/cases/scotus/73279493/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73279493/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73279493/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml; se

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n -i \"^(opinions below|jurisdiction|statutory provisions|statement|reasons for granting|argument|conclusion|table of contents)|circuit split|split|conflict|vehicle|Geiger|willful|malicious|Eleventh Circuit|subjective|false imprisonment|bankruptcy\" data/cases/scotus/73279493/record/documents/petition.txt | head -n 260","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '275,805p' data/cases/scotus/73279493/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '850,1365p' data/cases/scotus/73279493/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000});
text(r.output);

const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation lookup|case law|docket/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description));
text(matches);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert petitions|Segment base rate by salience band|relist|CVSG|Eleventh|Paid|Term 2025|2025 Term|fee\" metrics/statpack.md | head -n 240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,190p' metrics/statpack.md; rg -n -i 'salience|eleventh|ca11|11th|fee_class|paid' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 200","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\") and .term == \"2025\")' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 500","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq '.terms' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --citation '523 U.S. 57' --era 2020s --limit 10 --corpus-backend ranged 2>&1","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", q:"\"willful and malicious injury\" AND (subjective OR \"substantial certainty\") AND Geiger", filed_before:"2026-07-16", fields:["id","caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","absolute_url","snippet"], num_results:10, order_by:"score desc"});
for (const c of (result?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }

const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", q:"\"objective substantial certainty\" \"subjective motive\" \"523(a)(6)\"", filed_before:"2026-07-16", fields:["caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","absolute_url","status"], num_results:10, order_by:"dateFiled desc"});
for (const c of (result?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }

const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", case_name:"MarketGraphics Research Grp. v. David Berge", fields:["caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","absolute_url","opinions","snippet"], num_results:3});
for (const c of (result?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }

const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions", item_id:4520268, fields:["id","cluster","html_with_citations"]});
for (const c of (result?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }

const result = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o", q:"\"false imprisonment\" AND \"523(a)(6)\"", filed_before:"2026-07-16", fields:["caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","absolute_url","opinions"], num_results:10, order_by:"score desc"});
for (const c of (result?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); else if (c.type === "image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find data/cases -path '*/predictions/*/*/prediction.json' -print | head -n 3 | while read -r f; do printf '%s\\n' \"$f\"; sed -n '1,180p' \"$f\"; done; date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; git status --short","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);
